heading: Working capital fund; availability for centralized personnel data collection and reporting and common regional administrative support services
label: 3513a Working capital fund; availability for centralized personnel data collection and reporting and common regional administrative support services
text: The Working Capital Fund of the Department of Health and Human Services shall on and after , be available for expenses necessary for centralized personnel data collection and reporting and common regional administrative support services.January 11, 1971
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of title II of , popularly known as the Department of Health, Education, and Welfare Appropriation Act, 1971.Pub. L. 91–667Section was formerly classified to .section 3510 of this title

Change of Name“Department of Health and Human Services” substituted in text for “Department of Health, Education, and Welfare” pursuant to , which is classified to , Education.section 509(b) of Pub. L. 96–88section 3508(b) of Title 20
